generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://example.org/base#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf-vocab#"

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane system status"
]

instance OptimalMotionPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation provides motion plans for efficient crane operation"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for trajectory modeling validation"
]

instance TrajectoryDiscrepancyAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation alerts notify operators of trajectory discrepancies"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data insights for system performance analysis"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection via time-series classification techniques identifies system anomalies"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Corrective actions triggered by fault detection",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SystemEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution tracking for digital twin development stages"
]

instance SensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data insights for system state monitoring"
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data visualization via Grafana dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model (preventing residual swinging)",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalMotionPlanInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for trajectory modeling",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real vs. simulated trajectories",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryDiscrepancyAlert
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection via time-series classification techniques identifies system anomalies",
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight, CorrectiveAction
]

instance SystemEvolutionTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System evolution tracking for digital twin development stages",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemEvolutionInsight
]

instance SensorDataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data collection from physical crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataInsight
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage deployed via Docker containerization",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT Broker for message queuing and data transfer",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService, HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling"
]

instance CapellaMBSE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Arcadia-based Model-Based Systems Engineering",
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionTrackingService
]

instance ArduinoHardwareControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor and actuator control",
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataCollectionService
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionSensor
]

instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionSensor
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionMetricsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SystemStateSensor
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing Angle Encoder measuring hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart motor position sensor for horizontal movement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist motor position sensor for vertical movement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SystemStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "System state monitoring for trajectory execution metrics",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TrajectoryExecutionMetricsDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart motor (stepper) with TMC4671-Eval controller for horizontal movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist motor (stepper) with TMC4671-Eval controller for vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the hoist end for container pickup"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for crane system"
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created using Autodesk Fusion360"
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements from hoist motion",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance CartMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cart motor position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance HoistMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hoist motor position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trajectory execution metrics including timing and accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrajectoryExecutionMetricsDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance CraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp",
    base:contains CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, PowerSupplyUnit, ArduinoHardwareControl
]

instance CentralizedDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single centralized digital twin system composed of six interconnected containers",
    base:contains TimescaleDB, GrafanaDashboard, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal movement trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are executed via the Control Application, which sends control commands through the Physical Crane Interface to the motor controllers and electromagnet. Operator commands from the Human Machine Interface also trigger physical actions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization with real-time data logging and validation. The Continuous Validation Service compares measurements and simulations in real-time, with no explicit time intervals specified but described as 'continuously' operating during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated as per C4 Model with physical components (Crane, Interface, Control App, Logging App, HMI) and digital twin components (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation, MQTT Broker) interacting via MQTT and database. All components deployed on a single personal computer using Docker for containerized services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily covers 'as operated' phase, with continuous validation, fault detection, and trajectory optimization during operational use. CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360 represent 'as designed' phase, but the primary application focuses on real-time operational monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares real trajectory measurements with simulated trajectories using distance metrics against predefined thresholds. Threshold breaches trigger operator notifications via dashboard, ensuring model fidelity during operation. Validation methods reused from prior research on model validation for cyber-physical systems."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Physical Crane Interface connects to hardware controllers via Python, though specific industrial protocols (e.g., Modbus) are not specified. Database accessed via SQL queries from Python applications."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a personal computer; Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers deployed via Docker Compose. All Python-based services (Control App, Logging App, HMI) bundled in gantrylib module. Full system deployed on a single machine with automatic initialization via docker-compose."
]
